functions.name: bceinternalsdk.client.bce_internal_client.parse_json
documentation:
If the body is not empty, convert it to a python object and set as the value of
response.body. http_response is always closed if no error occurs.

```
param http_response

the http_response object returned by HTTPConnection.getresponse()

type http_response

httplib.HTTPResponse

param response

general response object which will be returned to the caller

type response

baidubce.BceResponse

return

always true
```

\:rtype bool

classes.name: bceinternalsdk.client.bce_internal_client.BceInternalClient

methods.name: bceinternalsdk.client.bce_internal_client.BceInternalClient._send_request
documentation: Send request to the bce service.

A client class for interacting with bce service. Initializes with default configuration.

This client provides an interface to interact with the Artifact service using BCE (Baidu Cloud Engine) API.
It supports operations related to creating and retrieving artifacts within a specified workspace.

Args:
    config (Optional[BceClientConfiguration]): The client configuration to use.
    ak (Optional[str]): Access key for authentication.
    sk (Optional[str]): Secret key for authentication.
    endpoint (Optional[str]): The service endpoint URL.
    context (Optional[dict]): The user context.

classes.name: bceinternalsdk.client.paging.PagingRequest

methods.name: bceinternalsdk.client.paging.PagingRequest.get_page_no
documentation:
Get the effective page number to retrieve.

Returns:
   int: The page number, which defaults to 1 if page_no is 0.

methods.name: bceinternalsdk.client.paging.PagingRequest.get_page_size
documentation:
Get the effective number of items per page.

Returns:
    int: The number of items per page, which defaults to 20 if page_size is 0.
           If page_size exceeds 100, it is capped at 100.

Represents a paging configuration for retrieving data.

Args:
    page_no: The page number to retrieve. Default is 0.
    page_size : The number of items per page. Default is 0.
    order : The sorting order for the results. Default is "asc" (ascending).
    orderby : The field by which to order the results. Default is an empty string.
